earning_rates.notes: On air travel purchased directly from airlines or through CitiTravel.com.
On hotel stays purchased directly or through CitiTravel.com.

other_benefits.name: Points Transfer
other_benefits.description: Transfer points to Citi's airline and hotel partners including Singapore Airlines, Air France/KLM, Emirates, JetBlue, and more at 1:1.

sources.notes: Official Citi page confirms 60K bonus, $95 AF, 10x on CitiTravel, 3x on travel/dining/supermarkets/gas, $100 annual hotel credit, no FTf.
Daily Drop review confirms current offer of 60K points, $100 annual hotel benefit, no FTf, travel protections.
TPG comparison of Strata cards confirms current 60K offer for Strata Premier.
CNBC review confirms $95 AF, 60K welcome bonus, 3x on dining/supermarkets/gas/travel.

recurring_credits.name: Annual Hotel Credit
recurring_credits.description: $100 annual credit for prepaid hotels via Citi Travel.

recurring_credits.name: $100 Annual Hotel Benefit
recurring_credits.description: Once per calendar year, enjoy $100 off a single hotel stay of $500 or more (excluding taxes and fees) when booked through CitiTravel
